backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores a single global high score, exposing `submitScore` to update it if beaten and `getHighScore` to retrieve it.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three game features (tap gameplay, high score backend, arcade visual theme) to their implementing source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Tap Blitz app, mounting the React root and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the single GamePage as the entire application.
frontend/src/components/GameCanvas.tsx: Main gameplay area component rendering the HUD (score, timer, high score), tap targets, tap-feedback burst animations, and a background grid overlay.
frontend/src/components/GameOverScreen.t: Game over screen showing the final score, all-time high score, an optional new-high-score trophy badge, and a neon-styled Play Again button.
frontend/src/components/StartScreen.tsx: Splash screen displaying the Tap Blitz logo, current high score, an animated start button, and a how-to-play instructions card.
frontend/src/components/Target.tsx: Individual tap target rendered as a neon glowing circle that visually shrinks over its lifetime and plays a burst animation on tap before calling the onTap callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: Custom React hook managing core game logic including target spawning, countdown timer, expired target cleanup, score tracking, and game status transitions (idle/playing/gameover).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider for Internet Identity authentication, handling login, logout, identity persistence, and exposing auth status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching the player's high score from the backend canister and submitting a new score via mutation, with cache invalidation on new high scores.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining the arcade dark theme with neon color variables, Tailwind base/component/utility layers, and custom component styles for game UI elements like buttons, targets, and the HUD bar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Game.tsx: Main game page component that orchestrates game state, score submission, and conditionally renders the StartScreen, GameCanvas, or GameOverScreen based on current game status.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with neon colors, Orbitron/Inter fonts, custom box shadows, arcade-themed keyframe animations, and oklch-based design token colors.
project_state.json: Project metadata file tracking the current state, implemented features, architectural notes, and requirements for the Tap Blitz mobile game project.
